title: Resolution Respectfully Returning the Request of the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw Dated December 18, 2020 From the August Body for an Authority to Enter Into and Renew Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with Pilotage Trading and Construction Incorporated on Ensuring Safe and Secure Disposal of Residual Solid Waste and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR(S): Hon. Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Leste
